title: Reign Of Nether Additions
description: In this Minecraft Real Time Strategy Mod you build your own Village and fight against other players. This is a modified version of "Reign of Nether" by SoLegendary.
body:
# Reign of Nether: Minecraft as an RTS

This is an extension of the mod [Reign of Nether](https://github.com/SoLegendary/reignofnether) by [SoLegendary](https://github.com/SoLegendary/) that adds new structures and game mechanics.

![reignofnether_village](https://i.postimg.cc/KYNQSTQZ/390884214-abf34986-625e-4fcc-9e6c-730eb019ad90.png)

The original mod is here:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/reign-of-nether-rts](https://modrinth.com/mod/reign-of-nether-rts)

# What Was Added

## Structures
+ added an ore mine
+ added a defense wall

## Research
+ added worker farm speed upgrade
+ added military production speed upgrade

![Ore Mine](https://i.postimg.cc/jSNZv51h/2024-12-03-22-00-55.png)
![Wall](https://i.postimg.cc/fLxtkV8J/2024-12-03-22-04-07.png)
